TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alejandro_Giammattei, title = Alejandro_Giammattei, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alejandro_Giammattei} }

S.FORM: Alejandro Giammattei ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 3, Alejandro Giammattei, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Alejandro Giammattei, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Alejandro Giammattei minkahul sa Guatemala City na Guatemala. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Alejandro Giammattei ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 3, Alejandro Giammattei, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Alejandro Giammattei, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Alejandro Giammattei minkahul sa Guatemala City na Guatemala. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: alejan*ro ɣiammattei rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, alejan*ro ɣiammattei, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣuatemala taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alejan*ro ɣiammattei, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral alejan*ro ɣiammattei minkaħul s~ɕa ɣuatemala ʦ~ʨitj na ɣuatemala. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun
